caption: The video features two men sitting side by side, engaged in a conversation. The man on the left, Rick Segall, is gesturing with his hands as he speaks, indicating that he is explaining or emphasizing a point. He has tattoos on his arms and is wearing a dark green t-shirt. The man on the right, Korbin Miles, is listening attentively with his hand resting on his chin, suggesting he is deep in thought or considering what Rick is saying. Behind them, a television screen displays the words "OUR STUPID REACTIONS," and a shelf filled with DVDs is visible, adding to the casual and relaxed atmosphere of the setting. The overall scene suggests a friendly and informal discussion, possibly related to content they are reviewing or reacting to.
